revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Random in category/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Random in category/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Random in category/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Random in category/doc]]</includeonly>

#redirect[[:en:Template:Random in category/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Random in category/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23573030467|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{tsh|RIC}} == Usage == This template gives a button to use [[Special:RandomInCategory]] to go to a random page in a category. It should be only used in the Category namespace; using it in other namespaces will return an error. There is one optional parameter, |text which will change the text of the button. {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Internal link templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24964547982|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{tsh|RIC}} == Usage == This template gives a button to use [[Special:RandomInCategory]] to go to a random page in a category. It should be only used in the Category namespace; using it in other namespaces will return an error. There is one optional parameter, |text which will change the text of the button. {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Internal link templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
